description: Part E + F: Screenshot harness (4 new captures) + result brief. CRITICAL: DO NOT change the localCurrentDirVfs line or its import (B007).
steps: Modify game/src/desktopMain/kotlin/game/ScreenshotHarness.kt: Add 4 new capture functions and register them in main(). CRITICAL: The line 'private val OUT = localCurrentDirVfs["build/screenshots"]' and its import 'import korlibs.io.file.std.localCurrentDirVfs' must NOT be changed (B007).

Add captureFrozenApproach(): Load Exterior.tmx via MapConfig.frozenApproach(). Create SnowGrid (fill all cells around player spawn with depth 0.6-0.8). Apply LightingFilter (ambientDarkness=0.08, one warm LightSource at player pos = torch). Apply FogFilter (density=0.4). Apply night color tint. Add SnowOverlay. Camera centered on player. Save as 'frozen_approach.png'.

Add captureFrozenFootprints(): Same Exterior.tmx setup. Fill SnowGrid around player. Stamp FootprintGrid in a trail behind the player (5-8 stamps in a line from south to player position). Add SnowOverlay + FootprintOverlay. The trail should be visible as dark gaps in the snow. Save as 'frozen_footprints.png'.

Add captureFrozenBlood(): Same Exterior.tmx + snow setup. Fill BloodGrid with 2-3 fresh spills (freshness=1.0) and 2-3 old spills (freshness=0.2) around the player. SnowGrid filled so blood shows on white. Add SnowOverlay + BloodOverlay. Save as 'frozen_blood.png'.

Add captureQuestbookGlory(): Render the questbook screen content directly in the harness (similar to captureQuestbookOpen pattern). Show the fully decorated book: parchment, binding, borders, frames, real entries from SliceDirector. The book should be at its final open state (scaleX=1, scaleY=1 - end of open animation). Save as 'questbook_glory.png'.
Register all 4 captures in the main() function after the existing captureQuestbookOpen() call.

IMPORTANT POSITIONING: All overlays and grids must be filled AROUND the player spawn position. Camera is centered on the player (lesson from 7d). For frozenApproach config, player spawns at exterior spawn (-5, 9). Grid offsets must match CollisionGrid offsets. Fill grid indices that correspond to tiles near (-5,9) so they appear on-camera.

Create briefs/2026-06-28-korge-step8-frozen-approach-result.md: Result report following the template in handoff-protocol.md. Document what was implemented, test results, any deviations, DO_NOT_TOUCH compliance.
acceptance_criteria: localCurrentDirVfs line and import in ScreenshotHarness.kt are UNCHANGED (B007)
4 new capture functions exist: captureFrozenApproach, captureFrozenFootprints, captureFrozenBlood, captureQuestbookGlory
Captures fill grids around the player position so effects are on-camera
